name: io.github.Dan-Cleary/convalytics
description: Analytics for Convex apps over MCP. Nine read tools cover traffic, events, per-user activity, and period-over-period digests; six funnel tools let agents list/compute and (with a write-scoped token) create/update/delete saved conversion funnels. For Claude, Cursor, and other MCP clients.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Convalytics API token. Create at https://convalytics.dev/tokens. Paste as 'Bearer cnv_...'.
